codeReview.evidence: Scoped code and deploy review passed with no blockers.

manualQa.evidence: Live Cloud Run MCP authenticated smoke and no-auth rejection both passed.

adversarialCases.scenario: Connect to the live MCP endpoint without MCP_LAB_BEARER_TOKEN.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The endpoint rejects the MCP request with auth failure.

adversarialCases.scenario: Scan deployment docs and evidence for secret-like literal values and local paths.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: No secret value, private key, JWT, literal bearer value, or local user path is present.

artifactRefs.description: Cloud Build, Cloud Run, Secret Manager, and project readiness evidence.

gateReview.evidence: Final gate review passed with no blockers.

rerunCommands: uv run --with pytest --with anyio --with httpx --with typing-extensions --with pydantic --with websockets python -m pytest tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_mcp_lab_smoke.py tests/integration/legal_ontology/test_mcp_debt_only_server.py -q

uv run --with ruff ruff check scripts/recova_mcp/mcp_lab_smoke.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_mcp_lab_smoke.py tests/integration/legal_ontology/test_mcp_debt_only_server.py trustgraph-mcp/trustgraph/mcp_server/legal_only.py

uv run --with basedpyright --with pytest --with anyio --with httpx --with typing-extensions --with pydantic --with websockets basedpyright --level error scripts/recova_mcp/mcp_lab_smoke.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_mcp_lab_smoke.py tests/integration/legal_ontology/test_mcp_debt_only_server.py trustgraph-mcp/trustgraph/mcp_server/legal_only.py
iteration.evidence: Focused reruns passed; live MCP smokes passed.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Deploy Recova Brain MCP staging on a billing-enabled Google Cloud project and verify live MCP behavior.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Cloud Run staging is live, authenticated MCP works, unauthenticated access is rejected, docs/evidence are accurate, and no secrets leak.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: The fallback project slit-497603 now hosts the live staging service; recova-brain-mcp remains documented as billing-blocked.
